data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence regarding the management of versioned waivers or the re-signing process when a waiver is updated. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary functionality to confirm compliance with the requirement is not demonstrated.
gaps: No evidence of versioned waiver templates being created, managed, or validated.
No evidence of capturing re-signing when form version changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when form version changes.
